rulings.Case Title: FLORA NG VS. STERLING REAL ESTATE PARNERS II, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Sterling Real Estate Partners Ii, Llc; Sterling Pacific Lending, Inc. Dba Sterling Pacific Financial; Yosemite Mangement Group, Llc'S Motion To Strike 3rd Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 10, 2012, line 1. Defendants Sterling Real Estate Partners II, LLC; Sterling Pacific Lending, Inc. dba Sterling Pacific Financial; Yosemite Mangement Group, LLC's motion to strike 3rd amended complaint. Sustain, ten days leave to amend to plead facts to support 1) tender rule exception per Hauger v. Gates.

rulings.Case Title: FLORA NG VS. STERLING REAL ESTATE PARNERS II, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Sterling Real Estate Partners Ii, Llc; Sterling Pacific Lending, Inc. Dba Sterling Pacific Financial; Yosemite Mangement Group, Llc'S Demurrer To 3rd Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 10, 2012, line 1. Defendants STERLING REAL ESTATE PARTNERS II, LLC, STERLING PACIFIC LENDING, INC., DBA STERLING AND YOSEMITE MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain, ten days leave to amend to plead facts to support 2) Overstatement of amount due in notice of default. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STANLEY CHAN VS. JOHNSON CHAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 10, 2012, line 7. Defendant Johnson Chan's Motion to Set Aside Default/Default Judgment/Leave to Defend. Deny. No Excusable neglect. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JONES STREET TERRACE ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. SONIKA MADARASMI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 10, 2012, line 2. Defendant Sason Parry's Motion to Set Aside Default/Default Judgment;Leave to Defend. Deny, failed to show excusable neglect. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS NAVARRO VS. ANNE MARIE BALLOWE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 10, 2012, line 3. Defendants Chris Van Pell and Ann Marie Ballowe's demurrer to complaint. Sustian, with 5 days leave to amend if can plead in good faith modification/change to written agreement. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAWRENCE L SHANE VS. SHELDON HENRY CIMENT et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 10, 2012, line Defendnt Sheldon Ciment's Motion to Strike. Motion to strike improperly before court and moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAWRENCE L SHANE VS. SHELDON HENRY CIMENT et al

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM CODY VS. CHRIS FORSBERG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Otion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 10, 2012, line 5. Defendant Chris Forsberg's motion to set aside default and default judgment. Grant subject to posting November, December and January rent. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SARA MASCALL et al VS. DANIEL DIAZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 10, 2012, line 6. Defendant Daniel Diaz's Motin to Quash Service of Summons. Grant. Action filed prematurely, i.e., prior to expiration of the 60 days counted from date of certified mail return receipt. = (501/REQ)
